codeReview.summary: The worker successfully added a comprehensive Breaking Changes section to CHANGELOG.md for version 0.2.0-agentic. All three breaking changes specified in the feature requirements are documented with clear migration guides and command examples.

summary: PASS - The Breaking Changes documentation is complete and well-structured. Each of the three breaking changes (csv/human format removal, retry-failed command removal, --limit rename) has: (1) a clear description of what changed, (2) a migration guide explaining what to use instead, and (3) before/after command examples. The format follows the existing CHANGELOG pattern established in version 2.0.0, and the Spanish language is consistent with the rest of the document. No issues identified.
